'''hawuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:head|head]]". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:head|head]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hawuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwiyith|hæwiyith]] || [[word:hæwiyij|hæwiyij]] || [[word:hæwiyish|hæwiyish]] || [[word:hæwiyi|hæwiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawuwuyuth|hawuwuyuth]] || [[word:hawuwuyuj|hawuwuyuj]] || [[word:hawuwuyush|hawuwuyush]] || [[word:hawuwuyu|hawuwuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawuyuth|hawuyuth]] || [[word:hawuyuj|hawuyuj]] || [[word:hawuyush|hawuyush]] || [[word:hawuyu|hawuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawufyuth|hawufyuth]] || [[word:hawufyuj|hawufyuj]] || [[word:hawufyush|hawufyush]] || [[word:hawufyuf|hawufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawuyuthu|hawuyuthu]] || [[word:hawuyuju|hawuyuju]] || [[word:hawuyushu|hawuyushu]] || [[word:hawuyuku|hawuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawuyuth|hawuyuth]] || [[word:hawuyuj|hawuyuj]] || [[word:hawuyush|hawuyush]] || [[word:hawuyu|hawuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawuyuthul|hawuyuthul]] || [[word:hawuyujul|hawuyujul]] || [[word:hawuyushul|hawuyushul]] || [[word:hawuyukul|hawuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawuyuthuthu|hawuyuthuthu]] || [[word:hawuyujuju|hawuyujuju]] || [[word:hawuyushushu|hawuyushushu]] || [[word:hawuyuku|hawuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawuyuthun|hawuyuthun]] || [[word:hawuyujun|hawuyujun]] || [[word:hawuyushun|hawuyushun]] || [[word:hawuyukun|hawuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawuyuthuoro|hawuyuthuoro]] || [[word:hawuyujuoro|hawuyujuoro]] || [[word:hawuyushuoro|hawuyushuoro]] || [[word:hawuyukuoro|hawuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
